metaTitle: PDF Splitter — Split & Extract PDF Pages (Free, Private & Offline)
metaDescription: Split PDF files into separate pages or extract specific page ranges instantly in your browser. 100% private — your documents never leave your device. No limits.

howto.description: Drag and drop or click to upload the PDF you want to split. Processing happens entirely on your device.
Select your preferred method: extract specific pages (e.g., 1, 3-5), split every N pages, or divide the file into equal parts.
Review the page thumbnails to ensure you are selecting the correct sections of your document.
Click 'Split PDF' to process. Your separated files will be available for instant download, often as a single ZIP archive.

why: 100% private — your sensitive documents never leave your browser
Multiple split methods: by page, by range, or into equal parts
Extract only the specific pages you need for smaller file sizes
No re-encoding — original PDF quality is perfectly preserved
Works completely offline after the initial page load
No file size limits or registration required — completely free
Perfect for separating contracts, receipts, or large reports

faq.q: Is it safe to split my confidential documents here?
faq.a: Yes. Unlike other PDF services, our tool performs the splitting logic inside your browser's memory. Your file is never uploaded to any server, ensuring total privacy for legal or financial documents.

faq.q: Will splitting my PDF reduce its quality?
faq.a: No. The tool extracts the original data streams from your PDF without re-compressing them. The quality of images and text in the split files will be identical to the original.

faq.q: Can I extract just a single page?
faq.a: Absolutely. Simply enter the specific page number you need, and the tool will generate a new PDF containing only that page.

faq.q: Can I split a PDF into 10-page segments?
faq.a: Yes. Use the 'Split every N pages' option and set the value to 10. A 50-page PDF will automatically be divided into five 10-page documents.

faq.q: What happens if my PDF is password-protected?
faq.a: For privacy and technical reasons, you must remove the password from the PDF before splitting it. This ensures the browser can read and separate the pages locally.

faq.q: How are the split files delivered?
faq.a: Depending on the method chosen, you will either download a single new PDF or a ZIP file containing multiple separated PDF documents.

technicalSpecs.size: Ranges, Every N pages, Equal parts

troubleshooting: Split button not active? Check if you have entered a valid page range (e.g., 1-5, 8, 12-15). Ensure the numbers don't exceed the total page count.
File too large to process? Splitting very heavy PDFs (500MB+) might hit browser memory limits. Try splitting into fewer parts if the tab crashes.
Encrypted PDF? If your file has a 'Document Assembly' restriction, you must remove the owner password before this tool can separate the pages.
proTips: Type '1-5, 10' to extract the first five pages and page ten into a single new document simultaneously.
Use 'Split every N pages' to quickly break down massive monthly reports into individual daily or weekly segments.
Since this tool works offline, you can safely process sensitive contracts without an internet connection for maximum security.
